sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval information and EC history for material code AMI63-03021A, SHEET-M2X_BATTERY_BOTTOM_FILM, used with model 2G DETECTOR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval, drawing/checklist tracking, vendor identification, dimensional inspection criteria, EC history, and restricted substance confirmation.
keyPoints: Material code is AMI63-03021A and description is SHEET-M2X_BATTERY_BOTTOM_FILM.
Model is listed as 2G DETECTOR and vendor is K-WON Corporation.
Dimensional specifications are 135.8 ± 0.5 mm for width and 123.2 ± 0.5 mm for height, both with result OK.
EC History lists Rev. 00 dated 22.06.03 with comment 신규 승인.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is ambiguous: source identifies Samsung Electronics Co. and an internal proposal division, but no external regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated.
Revision field near the material code is blank, while EC History lists Rev. 00 and the combined source includes Form Version 03 and Form Version 00.
Document title is inferred from material code and description because no standalone title field is present in the source text.
